name: Ko-fi Thank-You Tweet (Aetherhaven)
description: Fires on Ko-fi support event. Routes through Manus for personalized copy, then posts tweet via @1Aether1Rose1 with HITL gate.

flow.label: Ko-fi Support Received
flow.note: Receives POST from Ko-fi dashboard webhook OR bridge payload from /api/webhooks/manus with source=manus_kofi_bridge.

flow.label: Route: Direct Ko-fi vs Manus Bridge

body.title: Write Ko-fi thank-you tweet for {{1.from_name}}
body.description: Supporter {{1.from_name}} gave {{1.amount}} {{1.currency}} via Ko-fi. Message: {{1.message}}. Write a warm, cosmic, personalized thank-you tweet under 280 chars. Fae-core meets cyberpunk tone. Sign off as @1Aether1Rose1.

flow.label: HITL Review Gate
flow.note: Pause and notify Mars for tweet review. Approve to publish.

webhook_urls_to_configure.make_scenario_incoming: Generated by Make when you create the CustomWebHook trigger
